description: Verified header navigation in mobile viewport; all links (Home, Portfolio, Videos, Contact) correctly route to their respective pages, but the 'Blog' link is missing from the header specifically on the Home page.

issues.name: Blog link missing from Home page header
issues.description: Expected: The 'Blog' link should be present in the header on all pages, including the Home page, as part of the consistent site navigation. Actual: The 'Blog' link is missing from the navigation header on the Home page ('/'). It is present on other pages like '/portfolio', '/videos', and '/contact'.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ in mobile viewport (375x812).
Notice that 'Blog' is missing, while 'okwasniewski', 'portfolio', 'videos', and 'contact' are present.
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/portfolio and observe that 'Blog' is now present in the header.
issues.expectedBehavior: The 'Blog' link should be present in the header on all pages, including the Home page, as part of the consistent site navigation.
issues.actualBehavior: The 'Blog' link is missing from the navigation header on the Home page ('/'). It is present on other pages like '/portfolio', '/videos', and '/contact'.
